package.name: sampling_based_planner_3d
package.description: ROS1 wrapper around TUMRT/sampling_based_3D_local_planning for the UNICORN ICRA 2026 3D racing stack. Provides an observation-mode node (unchanged upstream) and a state-aware variant that plugs into 3d_headtohead as overtake/recovery planner with dynamic_reconfigure cost weights. Upstream license: GPLv3 (see LICENSE).
